title: SourceCitation
description: A citation supporting a word interpretation at a specific point in time

title.description: Title of the source document or work

publishedDate.description: ISO8601 date, year string, or null

attribution.description: Usage rights / public domain / copyright notice

excerpt.description: The specific text excerpt being cited

relevanceNote.description: Why this source supports the interpretation

confidence.description: Editorial confidence that this source correctly supports the interpretation
